description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script with the commands set -ex, set -o errexit, set -o pipefail, apt-get -qq -y update > /dev/null, apt-get -qq -y install git > /dev/null, curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php > /dev/null, and COMPOSER_DISCARD_CHANGES=true php composer.phar install --quiet --no-interaction. Define two test jobs: test:php-5.5 using the php:5.5 image and test:php-7.0 using the php:7.0 image. In each job execute vendor/bin/ci test --show-successes=false --exit-code, with no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules.
